message:
🐛 Fix nightly regression suite (consistency, unit, workflow failures) (#10445)

* 🐛 Fix nightly regression suite (consistency, unit, workflow failures #10435 #10436 #10437)

## Root Cause
The nightly test suite detected consistency violations: fetch() calls without
AbortSignal timeout parameters. Phase 5 (Fetch Timeout) consistency check
requires all fetch calls to include signal parameters for proper cancellation
and timeout control.

## Changes
Added AbortSignal.timeout() to fetch calls in:
- web/src/components/auth/AuthCallback.tsx (line 106)
- web/src/lib/api.ts (line 149)
- web/src/lib/auth.tsx (line 191)
- web/src/lib/analytics-core.ts (line 390)

## Fixes
- #10435: Consistency-test Phase 5 violation (1 error)
- #10436: Related code quality that may affect test reliability
- #10437: Workflow failure due to regression detection

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Fix Cluster Users container overflow #10442

Add CSS constraints to prevent Cluster Users list items from overflowing outside the card:
- Add w-full to main container to constrain to parent width
- Add w-full overflow-hidden to user entries
- Add min-w-0 to flex containers to prevent flex items from exceeding parent
- Add truncate to text elements for overflow handling
- Add flex-shrink-0 to icons and badges to prevent unwanted shrinking
- Add w-full min-w-0 to groups container for proper width management

Fixes #10442

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
